articles.title: Qualcomm in Talks to Buy Tenstorrent to Expand AI Chip Capabilities
articles.description: Qualcomm has been in discussions to acquire AI chip startup Tenstorrent in a transaction that could value the company between $8B and $10B, according to The Information. Led by legendary chip architect Jim Keller, Tenstorrent would give Qualcomm a significant boost in AI data center capabilities. Talks are ongoing and the price could change.

articles.title: Qualcomm bets $14 billion on cracking NVIDIA AI monopoly with Modular acquisition
articles.description: Qualcomm acquired AI software startup Modular for $3.9B in an all-stock deal. The Mojo language and MAX inference engine aim to break NVIDIA's CUDA software moat. Combined with Dragonfly C1000 and Tenstorrent pursuit, this represents a ~$14B bet on the AI data center market.

articles.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Is In Talks To Buy Modular For $4 Billion
articles.description: Qualcomm is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire AI infrastructure software company Modular Inc. in a transaction valued at about $4B. The potential deal would expand Qualcomm's capabilities in AI software and infrastructure.

articles.title: Sources: Qualcomm in talks to design custom chips for ByteDance
articles.description: Qualcomm is in advanced talks with ByteDance to design custom chips, partly based on connectivity tech from recently acquired Alphawave Semi, according to four sources. The deal signals Qualcomm's push into custom ASIC design against Broadcom and Marvell.

articles.title: Qualcomm teams with OpenAI and MediaTek on AI smartphone chip
articles.description: OpenAI partnered with Qualcomm and MediaTek to co-develop smartphone processors optimized for on-device AI. The project could redefine the high-end handset market, challenging Apple's A-series and Samsung's Exynos in AI processing capabilities.

articles.title: Facing Potential Smartphone Weakness and Tough Competition, Qualcomm Stock's Outlook Is Not Particularly Strong
articles.description: High flash-memory prices and tough competition could prevent QCOM stock from generating good returns for investors. The analysis flags smartphone market softness and competitive pressure from MediaTek, Apple and Samsung as near-term headwinds.

articles.title: COMPUTEX 2026: Qualcomm declares "Year of AI Agents" with Snapdragon X2 Elite and Snapdragon C
articles.description: At COMPUTEX 2026, Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon declared 2026 the "Year of AI Agents." Unveiled Snapdragon C for budget AI PCs ($499+) and Snapdragon X2 Elite for premium Copilot+ PCs with up to 80 TOPs NPU. Acer Swift Spin 14 AI among first devices, directly challenging Intel and AMD in the Windows PC market.
